narrative: Iran-US tensions simmer as Tehran labels US proposals 'unserious'; safe-haven JPY bid lifts USD/JPY to 158.92. EUR/USD holds at 1.1769 as ECB-BoE policy divergence limits upside; gold lower -1.39% on subdued haven demand. DXY steady, USD mixed; S&P 500 +1.20% amid cautious sentiment, VIX at 19.5.
